solution:
```
class Solution:
    def unmarkedSumArray(self, nums: List[int], queries: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]:
        n = len(nums)
        marked = [False] * n
        res = []
        for i, k in queries:
            marked[i] = True
            nums.sort(key=lambda x: (marked[x], x))
            for j in range(n):
                if not marked[nums[j]]:
                    marked[nums[j]] = True
                    k -= 1
                    if k == 0:
                        break
            unmarked_sum = sum(x for x in nums if not marked[x])
            res.append(unmarked_sum)
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(m * n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a boolean array to keep track of marked elements and sorts the array based on marked status and value to efficiently mark the smallest unmarked elements.
